prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: LST-KPL-RACKETSET-BLU Product Type: SPORT_RACKET Brand (from catalog): Kidplokio Existing Title: Kidplokio 2pc Tennis Racket Exercise Equipment Outdoor Playset with Tennis Balls, Kid Games, Blue Yellow, Boys, Ages 3+ Description: If your little toddlers or young kids have a knack for sports, introduce them to tennis with this super fun kids' tennis racket indoor and outdoor playset from Kidplokio. The set comes with two lightweight tennis rackets and two coordinating plastic balls, so kids can easily play with siblings or friends.

Measuring 20 x 9 inches, the pair of tennis rackets have been specifically designed with smaller hands in mind. The smaller scale and lightweight design makes them easy for toddlers or kids to hold, hit and serve with when playing. And, made of lightweight plastic, the tennis rackets feature a padded and soft grip around the handle; this soft sponge wrap makes it easy for kids to hold the tennis racket, preventing fatigue, irritation or blisters so they can focus on playing and having fun.

An awesome way to get toddlers and kids moving indoors or out, exercising and learning a new sport. Fantastic for kids' aerobics, it also helps to develop their eye hand coordination and reaction times, while also improving their strength and flexibility.

The Kidplokio tennis racket play set makes a great addition to any sports and outdoor play toys collection or kids exercise equipment, is easy to pack and travel with, and most importantly, keeps little ones busy and active. Search Terms: kids summer sports tennis camp games activity badminton racket raquet racquet pickleball toddlers children learning and educational toys fitness hand eye coordination training holiday toy list 2021 stocking stuffer christmas gift hanukkah gifts Features: - KIDS TENNIS BALLS AND RACKET SET: Introduce toddlers and kids to tennis with this super fun kids' tennis racket indoor and outdoor playset from Kidplokio! The set comes with x2 lightweight plastic tennis rackets and two coordinating plastic balls so they can easily play with siblings or friends - TENNIS RACKETS DESIGNED FOR KIDS: Measuring 20 x 9 inches, the pair of tennis rackets have been specifically designed with smaller hands in mind! The smaller scale and lightweight design makes them easy for toddlers or kids to hold, hit and serve with when playing - EXERCISE EQUIPMENT FOR KIDS: An awesome way to get toddlers and kids moving indoors or out, exercising and learning a new sport; fantastic for kids' aerobics, it also helps to develop their eye hand coordination and reaction times, while also improving their strength and flexibility - PADDED TENNIS RACKET HANDLE: Made of lightweight plastic, the tennis rackets feature a padded and soft grip around the handle; this soft sponge wrap makes it easy for kids to hold the tennis racket, preventing fatigue, irritation or blisters so they can focus on playing and having fun! - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 20 x 9 x 2 inches; Weight: 0.825lbs; Colors: Pink/Yellow or Blue/Yellow; Warning: Choking Hazard, small parts; Material: Plastic; Ages: 3+ === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Kidplokio 2-pc Kids Tennis Racket Set Blue Yellow

openai.item_name: Kidplokio 2-pc Blue Yellow Tennis Racket Set

anthropic.title_differentiation: With 2 Balls, Padded Grip, Lightweight, Ages 3, Indoor Outdoor Play, Develops Hand Eye Coordination

openai.title_differentiation: 2 Rackets, 2 Balls, Padded Grip, Lightweight Plastic, Indoor Outdoor Play, Easy Carry, Ages 3 And Up
